title: stachys stricta
intro: Stachys stricta, also known as Betony, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys stricta include reducing anxiety and stress, soothing headaches and migraines, and promoting a restful sleep. The herbal preparations of Stachys stricta can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
